mapper.sql: tpei.group_id, tpei.operation_code, tpei.error_msg, tpei.data_status, tpei.name, tpei.work_card, tpei.id, tpei.create_time, tpei.create_by, tpei.update_time, tpei.update_by

${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
, isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(tpei.work_card) as varchar),6) and pe.name = tpei.name and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 ), '') as employee_id from td_plan_employee_interface tpei
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_employee_interface (group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, name, work_card, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_plan_employee_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into td_plan_employee_interface (group_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, name, work_card, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, 'C', case when isnull((select pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0), '') = '' then '在职人员中，没找到对应人员' else '' end, case when isnull((select pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0), '') = '' then 'F' else 'T' end, #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}) as varchar),6), getdate(), #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} , getdate(), #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}
